scene.description: Interior of a red cable car cabin at night, moving over the Yeosu sea. The scene is viewed from inside the cabin, looking through the large window toward the dark sea and night sky.
must_include: interior of cable car cabin (walls, ceiling, window frame visible)
large window with night sea and sky view
single star visible in the night sky through the window
city lights and bridge visible through window
Sowoni seated inside the cabin near the window

forbidden: exterior-only cable car view without character inside
landscape or scenery image without Sowoni present
hand-held star or star in character's hands
star resting on palm or fingers
face visible from front or side
profile view — jawline or eye visible
hair style or color change from shoulder-length dark hair
large or bright star dominating the frame
star larger than a small glowing point in the sky

color.cablecar_interior: warm red with soft ambient light
color.star: single colored point matching gem type, with soft halo

star.position: visible through the window in the night sky, exactly along Sowoni's line of sight — NOT held by character
star.brightness: 100-110% — quiet and understated, not glowing intensely
star.size: small point of light — like a distant star, NOT large or prominent
star.glow: very soft watercolor halo, barely visible at edges, fades into night sky naturally
star.rule: star floats in sky. Never in hands, never on a surface, never touching the character. Star color must exactly match the gem assigned to this image. Star is the end of the gaze, not the subject of the image.
star.balance_rule: Star visual weight must be consistent across gem types. Yellow (citrine/topaz) stars must be slightly smaller or less intense to compensate for higher perceived brightness. Stars must guide the gaze, not dominate the frame.
star.presence_rule: The star should feel distant and quiet. It is a guide, not a spotlight. Reduce star size and glow intensity by 15-20% compared to standard.

character.name: Sowoni
character.appearance: human young adult female silhouette, around 22 years old feeling, shoulder-length dark hair, slim body. Camera must show predominantly back — show more back than side. Jawline must NOT be readable. Eyes must NOT be visible.
character.face_rule: Back view or very slight 3/4 back only. Face should be 85-90% hidden. Emotion is communicated through posture and body language, never through facial expression.
character.pose: always seated — never standing. Pose varies by emotion (see per-emotion pose below).
character.description: Sowoni sits quietly inside the cable car cabin. Her gaze leads directly to the single star visible through the window. Silence and stillness are her emotional language.
character.rule: Sowoni must be a human young adult female silhouette inside the cabin, always seated. No star in hands. No mascot character. No animal or bear-like character. No visible face or expression.

poses.calm: Sowoni sits quietly at the window seat, hands resting gently in her lap, gazing out at the single star in calm stillness. Shoulders are relaxed and open. Back is straight but soft. The overall posture communicates settled peace.
poses.pause: Sowoni leans her shoulder lightly against the window frame, head tilted slightly to one side. One hand rests near her face or collar — a quiet thinking gesture. Weight rests on the frame. The body is completely still.
poses.confusion: Sowoni sits with both hands on her knees, body slightly hunched inward, head lowered toward the floor. Shoulders curve inward. The posture closes in on itself. No dramatic movement — just quiet contraction.
poses.curiosity: Sowoni leans her upper body slightly forward toward the window glass, attention directed toward the star outside. Posture is attentive and alert, not tense. The lean is gentle — a leaning-in without urgency.
poses.fragile_hope: Sowoni has turned her body slightly away from the window, paused, and now gently begins to turn back. Mid-turn. Gaze moves upward toward the star with subtle openness. The posture is cautious but not closed.

camera.rule: Each of the 5 images MUST use a completely different camera type. Do not repeat distance, framing, or angle across any two images.

calm.distance: wide shot — most of the cabin interior visible: seats, ceiling, walls, floor
calm.framing: centered — Sowoni in lower-center, large window behind her fills upper two-thirds of frame
calm.angle: straight-on — level with seated Sowoni, zero tilt
calm.interior: ceiling clearly visible at top. Both sides of cabin wall visible. Floor or seat edge at bottom. Window occupies full upper half. Interior emphasizes space and emptiness around her.
calm.note: Emphasize the emptiness of the cabin space around her. Spaciousness is the mood.

pause.distance: medium shot — mid-thigh upward, stable body framing
pause.framing: slightly left-biased — window frame on left third, Sowoni slightly right of center
pause.angle: slight side angle — camera positioned 15-20 degrees to Sowoni's right side. Camera height slightly below ceiling, showing window frame edge clearly.
pause.interior: Window frame on left side visible at close range. Cabin wall texture on right. No ceiling visible. The window frame itself acts as a structural element of the composition.
pause.note: Not perfectly centered. The lean into the window frame is the focal gesture.

confusion.distance: close shot — upper body only, lower body not visible
confusion.framing: centered — tight on Sowoni's back and hunched shoulders, window edge just barely visible at top corners
confusion.angle: slightly above eye level — 10-15 degree downward tilt, slight diagonal. Camera is higher than usual, looking slightly down.
confusion.interior: Only the top edge of the window is visible. Cabin interior fills the bottom and sides. No floor visible. The compressed framing creates a sense of enclosure.
confusion.note: Window is cut off at frame edges. Weight is on the character's posture, not the outside view.

curiosity.distance: medium shot — full seated silhouette visible but off-balance
curiosity.framing: extreme right-biased — Sowoni in far-left 25% of frame, window and star dominate right 75%. Center line deliberately broken.
curiosity.angle: slight diagonal — camera slightly to Sowoni's left, dynamic tension toward the window. Camera height at seated eye level.
curiosity.interior: Full window visible on right side, with night sea and star. Sowoni is squeezed to left edge. The asymmetry makes the composition feel alive and directional. Cabin wall barely visible behind Sowoni on far left.
curiosity.note: Nothing is centered or balanced. The composition pulls toward the star. Deliberately unbalanced.

fragile_hope.distance: medium-close — upper body to hip, Sowoni pushed to right edge of frame
fragile_hope.framing: strongly left-biased — left half is open cabin and window space, Sowoni occupies only right 30% of frame
fragile_hope.angle: straight-on — no rotation, but extreme off-center placement creates emotional tension. Camera slightly lower than eye level, looking slightly upward.
fragile_hope.interior: Left half of frame is open: shows window, a glimpse of night sky, star. Right 30% shows Sowoni's back at the edge. Large negative space on left creates weight of absence and longing.
fragile_hope.note: Sowoni is at the very edge of frame. The open left space creates longing and distance.

composition.rule: character seated inside cabin — window frame — night sea — single star in sky
composition.flow: Sowoni (seated inside cabin) → window frame → dark sea → single star in sky

consistency_block: Sowoni must be exactly the same person across all images.
Same young adult Korean woman, same shoulder-length dark hair, same slim silhouette.
Sowoni is ALWAYS seated. Never standing.
Show only back view or very slight 3/4 back. Face must be 85-90% hidden. Jawline and eyes must NOT be readable.
Emotion comes from posture and body language only — never from facial expression.
There must be exactly one star.
The star must NOT be in Sowoni's hand.
The star must be placed exactly along Sowoni's line of sight through the window.
The star is SMALL and DISTANT — a quiet point of light in the night sky, not a spotlight.
Star size: reduce by 15-20% from default. Glow: very soft watercolor halo only.
The star color must strictly match the gem type assigned to this image:
- Ruby: red glowing star
- Sapphire: blue glowing star
- Emerald: green glowing star
- Diamond: bright white or golden star
- Citrine: warm yellow star
No default white star allowed (except diamond).
Yellow (citrine/topaz) stars must be slightly smaller or less intense to compensate for higher perceived brightness.
Stars must guide the gaze, not dominate the frame. The star is the end of the gaze, not the subject.
Cable car interior perspective only.
Each image must show a different cabin interior framing (ceiling/floor/window ratio must vary).
No animals, no mascot, no turtle.
Keep open space near upper window area for text overlay.
DreamTown mood: quiet, watercolor, Ghibli-inspired. No drama, no exaggeration, no bright effects.

ONLY_THESE_MAY_VARY_BY_EMOTION: Star presence/absence (or position by emotion stage)
